title: Sixth Valkyrien
description: A minimal Valkyrien Skies modpack on Create 6
body:
## Sixth Valkyrien
A minimal working modpack with Valkyrien Skies on Create 6.0.8
----

It can be rather difficult, with the current Create mod ecosystem, to setup a modpack on Create 6.0.0+. Some mods are still on 0.5.1j, some only support up to 6.0.6, and some need 6.0.7+! I've seen many people struggling to setup packs with all their favorite mods, with Create 6. So, this pack aims to make that easy(er). 

It comes with Create 6.0.8 + Valkyrien Skies, as well as several VS addons for a fun experience. 


----

### Mod list (excluding dependencies):
- CC: Tweaked
- CC: VS
- Clockwork (Melting Point)
- Colorwheel
- Colorwheel patcher
- Control Craft
- Create (6.0.8)
- Create Big Cannons
- Create: Extra Guages
- Create: Interactive
- Create: Propulsion
- Create: Valkyrien Logistics
- Drive-by-wire
- Embeddium
- JEI
- Oculus
- Radium
- Trackwork
- Valkyrien Sails
- Valkyrien Skies
- VLib
- VMod
- Eureka
- Tournament
- VStuff
